title.en: Defiant Tuchel defends decisions and says loss is 'scar we carry now'
title.zh-CN: Defiant Tuchel为决策辩护，称损失是“我们现在留下的伤疤”

summary.en: England head coach Thomas Tuchel defends his tactical decisions during the World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina in a tense news conference.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）在世界杯半决赛期间在一场紧张的新闻发布会上为自己的战术决定辩护。

title.en: 'They made him a defensive player' - Trump questions Kane role in semi
title.zh-CN: “他们让他成为一名防守球员” -特朗普质疑凯恩在半决赛中的角色

summary.en: US President Donald Trump joins criticism of England's tactics in their World Cup semi-final loss to Argentina, by questioning Harry Kane's second-half "defensive" role.
summary.zh-CN: 美国总统唐纳德特朗普通过质疑哈里凯恩的下半场“防守”角色，加入了对英格兰在世界杯半决赛输给阿根廷的战术的批评。

title.en: Tuchel defiant in face of criticism over decisions in England exit: ‘I have no regrets’
title.zh-CN: 面对英格兰退出决定的批评，图切尔反抗： “我无怨无悔”

summary.en: Head coach refuses to engage in ‘blame game’ after defeat by ArgentinaTrump joins critics of Tuchel’s tactics in World Cup semi-final eliminationThomas Tuchel has insisted he is not interested in...
summary.zh-CN: 在阿根廷失利后，主教练拒绝参与“责备游戏”特朗普加入了对图切尔在世界杯半决赛淘汰赛中的战术的批评者托马斯·图切尔坚称他对……不感兴趣

title.en: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
title.zh-CN: 白宫在福克兰群岛旗帜上为阿根廷队辩护

summary.en: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.
summary.zh-CN: 这些评论可能会进一步加剧对该事件的争论，唐宁街也呼吁国际足联进行调查。

title.en: Keep calm and carry on - Spain trust team identity to deliver World Cup
title.zh-CN: 保持冷静，继续前进-西班牙信任团队身份，交付世界杯

summary.en: Former Spain captain Cesar Azpilicueta explains why Luis de la Fuente's side have confidence in the collective as they prepare for Sunday's World Cup final against Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 前西班牙队长Cesar Azpilicueta解释了为什么Luis de la Fuente的球队在准备周日对阵阿根廷的世界杯决赛时对集体充满信心。

title.en: Tuchel did not deliver, but his time with England is not up - Shearer
title.zh-CN: Tuchel没有交付，但他在英格兰的时间还没有结束- Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer says Three Lions boss Thomas Tuchel will not be fazed by criticism he has faced over the World Cup semi-final defeat.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）表示，三狮队老板托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）不会对他因世界杯半决赛失利而面临的批评感到困惑。

title.en: Pele at the Azteca? England in '66? Ranking the best World Cup finals
title.zh-CN: Pele at the Azteca ？ 66年的英格兰？排名世界杯最佳决赛

title.en: Underdogs, history and late goals - Africa's World Cup
title.zh-CN: 失败者、历史和后期目标-非洲世界杯

summary.en: The 2026 World Cup saw Africa send its largest ever contingent to the finals, but five sides were eliminated by late goals as underdogs Cape Verde impressed.
summary.zh-CN: 在2026年世界杯上，非洲派出了有史以来规模最大的队伍进入决赛，但佛得角的劣势球员给人留下了深刻的印象，五支球队被后期的进球淘汰出局。

title.en: England missing final piece of jigsaw - Kane
